sections.paragraph:
Original: כּבוּל

Transliteration: kâbûl

Phonetic: kaw-bool'

BDB Definition:

Cabul = "binding"
  1. a city on the border of Asher and located approx 10 miles (16 kilometers) east of Akko; modern 'Kabul'
  2. a district in Galilee given by Solomon to Hiram and contemptuously called 'Cabul' by Hiram

Origin: from the same as H3525 in the sense of limitation

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
